missing_implementations: System sends an HTTP GET request to https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/users.
System receives an array of user objects in the response.
Each user object in the response is included as a row in the resulting CSV file.
CSV file contains columns corresponding to each field in the user JSON object (e.g., id, name, username, email, etc.).
CSV column names are identical to the field names in the JSON object.
CSV file is saved to persistent storage and is accessible for later retrieval.
If the API request fails or the response is empty, the system does not create or modify the CSV file and signals an error.
No user data is omitted or transformed; all fields from the API response are included.
